{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/227-appendix-b-decision-framework-when-to-build-type-1.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Appendix B: Decision Framework — When to Build Type 1 First




{quote}_Абстракт_ (авто){quote}
>
{quote}🎯 _Проблема:_ another type: Choose Type 1 (Professional Colleague Agent) when: - Profession has well-defined standardized practices - Practitioners face significant routine burden - Professional{quote}
{quote}🏷️ _Ключевые слова:_ {{agent}}, {{appendix}}, {{types}}, {{anthropic}}, {{vacancies}}, {{professional}}, {{choose}}, {{build}}{quote}
>



{quote}For an organization deciding whether to build a Professional{quote}

----





h2. Appendix B: Decision Framework — When to Build Type 1 First

For an organization deciding whether to build a Professional
Colleague Agent vs. another type:

_Choose Type 1 (Professional Colleague Agent) when:_
* Profession has well-defined standardized practices
* Practitioners face significant routine burden
* Professional context is encodable in knowledge base
* No strong external communication requirement
* Regulatory environment for profession is clearer than for AI

_Choose Type 0 (Personal AI Assistant) when:_
* Use case is general-purpose, not profession-specific
* User has no specific professional context to embed
* Mass-market consumer product

_Choose Type 2 (Institutional Agent) when:_
* Institution has specific data/process integration needs
* Institutional rules are central to value delivery
* Per-institution customization is expected and accepted

_Choose Type 3 (Employee Agent) when:_
* Routine task can be cleanly delegated
* Liability framework permits autonomous action
* Quality of routine outputs is verifiable

_Choose Type 4 (Representative Agent) when:_
* Individual users need market navigation
* Personal context is rich and unique
* Long-term career-arc representation is valuable
* Trust infrastructure is mature

For most foundation-funded deployments serving professional
populations, Type 1 is the right starting point.

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md] (сходство 0.18)
* [269-appendix-a-the-six-type-taxonomy-updated|269-appendix-a-the-six-type-taxonomy-updated.md] (сходство 0.13)
* [220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md] (сходство 0.13)




----

* [226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md]

* [212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md]

* [1. The Five-Type Typology of Principal-Side Agents|212-1-the-five-type-typology-of-principal-side-agents.md]
* [12. Closing|223-12-closing.md]
* [2. What Makes a Professional Colleague Agent|213-2-what-makes-a-professional-colleague-agent.md]
* [9. Relationship to Other Agent Types|220-9-relationship-to-other-agent-types.md]
* [Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types|226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types.md]
* [Appendix A: The Six-Type Taxonomy (Updated)|269-appendix-a-the-six-type-taxonomy-updated.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
* [Кто ты|345-кто-ты.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]
